title: Sync/release receipt
description: The exact shape of sync-receipt.json as written by scripts/sync.mjs (on --mode apply) and verified by scripts/doctor.mjs, one per adapter target directory. There is exactly one receipt format in this repo — this schema documents it; it does not define a second, competing shape.

sourceRelease.description: Source release/version or commit this export was generated from. "unreleased" is the current placeholder until this repo cuts real releases.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp this receipt was generated at.

skills.description: One entry per exported skill, in the order scripts/sync.mjs resolved them (sorted by id).

receiptChecksum.description: sha256 over profile, sourceRelease, adapter.id, and each skill's skillChecksum — recomputed by scripts/doctor.mjs and scripts/validate.py to detect drift or hand-edits.
